author: ymrohit
name: Paper-Folded Recurrent GPT
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 architecture demonstration of a folded recurrent GPT: a compact visible stream projects into a folded working state, reuses two shared transformer blocks across five fold passes with fold-specific modulation, then exits through four polish blocks. The model treats depth as repeated computation over a folded representation rather than storing every layer independently. No TTT was used. Final int8+zlib roundtrip val_bpb is 1.19084839 with a 13.7MB artifact.
technique_summary: SP8192 + 1 visible stem block + 5 folded recurrent passes over 2 shared fold blocks + fold-specific refresh/preserve/update/gating controls + 4 exit blocks + progressive fold curriculum + int8 zlib export
